name: Basic Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a large pot and remove it.
2. Add the carrot and celery to the pot and cook over medium heat for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the onion, bay leaf, and whole cloves of garlic.
4. Add the pepper and continue cooking until all ingredients are well combined.
"All you really need is a big pot and some bacon bits. After that, you improvise.... (Otherwise) we are stuck with the tyranny of the formal recipe which defines The Only Way To Do It in a form as exact, and frequently as exciting, as a prescription from the doctor."
